account.title: My Account
account.subscriptionPlaceholder: Free plan — billing and subscription management will be added in a later phase.
account.securityPlaceholder: Password and security settings will be added in a later phase.
account.notificationsPlaceholder: Notification settings will be added in a later phase.
preferences.title: Application Preferences
preferences.intro: Personalize how HFZWood looks and how measurements are shown. These settings affect only your account and never change saved project data.
preferences.interfaceLanguageHelp: Controls navigation, buttons, dialogs, and system messages.
preferences.lengthUnitHelp: Used for measurement labels and calculator inputs. Internal calculations stay canonical.
preferences.volumeUnitHelp: Used for resin volume displays and calculator outputs.
locked.title: Create your free HFZWood account to unlock this section.
locked.body: The complete HFZWood workspace becomes available after authentication. Your free account gives you access to projects, manuals, tutorials, glossary, knowledge base and resin calculation tools.
unsaved.title: You have unsaved changes.
unsaved.body: If you leave this workspace now, your current project work will be lost.
unsaved.question: What would you like to do?
content.unavailableManual: Manual content is not yet available in the selected language.
content.unavailableGlossary: Glossary content is not yet available in the selected language.
content.unavailableKnowledgeBase: Knowledge base content is not yet available in the selected language.
calculator.referenceLengthPositive: Reference length must be greater than 0 ({unit}).
calculator.cavityDepthPositive: Cavity depth must be greater than 0 ({unit}).
calculator.mainPourDepthPositive: Main pour depth must be greater than 0 ({unit}).
